recommendations.asmdefNotes: CityZero.* asmdefs are structured for modular compilation. Ensure asmdef files are placed at package roots and that references match package names. CityZero.UI references TextMeshPro — confirm package installed and asmdef reference matches exact package assembly name (Unity.TextMeshPro).
recommendations.editorAsmdef: CityZero.Editor includes Editor platform in includePlatforms; ensure it remains Editor-only.
recommendations.noEngineReferences: All asmdefs have noEngineReferences=false which is appropriate for Unity runtime code. If you need pure .NET libraries, set noEngineReferences=true and manage references.
nextSteps: Open Unity project and validate asmdef resolution in the editor (Assets -> Refresh)
Install recommended packages via Package Manager: TextMeshPro, Input System, Addressables, Cinemachine, AI Navigation, URP, Timeline, Unity Test Framework, ProBuilder.
Run Unity's Assembly Definitions validation (Editor tools) to find missing references.
If using Addressables, create AddressableGroups folder and define groupings for large asset packs.
Ensure assembly names do not conflict with other packages; consider prefixing with Company.Project if needed.
